quotes.text: You want to saw with these saws?

quotes.text: Take my hexing stick and transform some of these priests into something more interesting.

quotes.text: Our enemies are infesting the Garden of the Loa once more, and they need to learn a good lesson in manners. The power of the Loa be with you!
quotes.transcript: Our enemies are infesting the Garden of the Loa once more, and they need to learn a good lesson in manners. The power of the Loa be with you!

quotes.text: Ever since Hakkar, there is a weakness in the Guruvashi's mind. Their path can be too easily corrupted and must be purged.
quotes.transcript: Ever since Hakkar, there is a weakness in the Guruvashi's mind. Their path can be too easily corrupted and must be purged.

quotes.text: These feathered vipers are known for their aggressive infestations. But this is getting out of hand. Destroy their eggs to keep their population in check.
quotes.transcript: These feathered vipers are known for their aggressive infestations. But this is getting out of hand. Destroy their eggs to keep their population in check.

quotes.text: Like my Loa always says. Doc! Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha!

quotes.text: That will give the Restari a bit of breathing room. You have done well, champion.
quotes.transcript: That will give the Restari a bit of breathing room. You have done well, champion.

quotes.text: The Rastari have been working to flush the Mogu out of the war port, but to no avail. Rally them and crush any Mogu that get in your way.
quotes.transcript: The Rastari have been working to flush the Mogu out of the war port, but to no avail. Rally them and crush any Mogu that get in your way.

quotes.text: Loti had you picking up packages? I would have just had you hexed-y-bees and called it a day. But the merchants always complain when I do that.
quotes.transcript: Loti had you picking up packages? I would have just had you hexed-y-bees and called it a day. But the merchants always complain when I do that.

quotes.text: It will take time to mess up enough guards to hold the old merchant road as we once did. Your help is appreciated.
quotes.transcript: It will take time to mess up enough guards to hold the old merchant road as we once did. Your help is appreciated.

quotes.text: Ha ha! They don't call me the Hex Lord for nothing!
quotes.transcript: Ha ha! They don't call me the Hex Lord for nothing!

quotes.text: Ha! A fine show of respect for Parkour!
quotes.transcript: Ha! A fine show of respect for Parkour!

quotes.text: The Guru Basi have worked themselves into a murderous frenzy. Let us help them out with dying, hit the gong and watch them come running.
quotes.transcript: The Guru Basi have worked themselves into a murderous frenzy. Let us help them out with dying, hit the gong and watch them come running.

quotes.text: The villagers of Zebihari still live under the knife of Zul's assassins. Save them and slay those who target innocents from the shadows.
quotes.transcript: The villagers of Zebihari still live under the knife of Zul's assassins. Save them and slay those who target innocents from the shadows.

quotes.text: My wife claims the ramasaws can eat whatever they like. If true, the linings of their stomachs must be like iron. Gather some of those linings for me before she takes notice.
quotes.transcript: My wife claims the ramasaws can eat whatever they like. If true, the linings of their stomachs must be like iron. Gather some of those linings for me before she takes notice.

quotes.text: The Nightborne have an idea of how to handle the invaders in Shibala. This should be fun to watch.
quotes.transcript: The Nightborne have an idea of how to handle the invaders in Shibala. This should be fun to watch.

quotes.text: These dwarf things are not taking the hint. They are not welcome here. Show them how the Zandalari deal with Intrudas.
quotes.transcript: These dwarf things are not taking the hint. They are not welcome here. Show them how the Zandalari deal with Intrudas.

quotes.text: That was a proper lesson you taught them. We will see if they learn from it.
quotes.transcript: That was a proper lesson you taught them. We will see if they learn from it.

quotes.text: Gaunt Druids are too uptight. Play some pranks on their altars to get them to lighten up. Oh, and they may try to kill you for this.
quotes.transcript: Gaunt Druids are too uptight. Play some pranks on their altars to get them to lighten up. Oh, and they may try to kill you for this.

quotes.text: Merlux invade our shores. If they aren't called immediately, they will quickly grow beyond our control.
quotes.transcript: Merlux invade our shores. If they aren't called immediately, they will quickly grow beyond our control.

quotes.text: Better to deal with a threat now, then regret it later.
quotes.transcript: Better to deal with a threat now, then regret it later.

quotes.transcript: Darkness, give me strength!

quotes.text: That was when we got our first taste of real blood magic. Not that petty nonsense practiced by the lesser tribes.
quotes.transcript: That was when we got our first taste of real blood magic. Not that petty nonsense practiced by the lesser tribes.

quotes.text: Not a week goes by that we do not see some Zandalari turning to blood magics learned from those heretics in Nazmir.

quotes.text: Hmm, something feels different. I sense a great power resonating inside Zanchul.

quotes.text: We shall ride after the Wing Lord on this journey. Hop on and keep your eyes open!

quotes.text: A few years back, this whole land shook during the cataclysm. Our northern gates fell and swarms of bloodthrow savages poured through.

quotes.text: Our defenses grow weaker. Princess Telangji has been asking for more troops, but her father has not acted fast enough and she has turned to the Horde.
quotes.transcript: Our defenses grow weaker. Princess Telangji has been asking for more troops, but her father has not acted fast enough and she has turned to the Horde.

quotes.text: I serve Paku, one of the oldest of the Loa.

quotes.text: Oh, oh, oh, oh, yeah. Keep doing that. Just a little bit to your right.

quotes.text: Ha! I knew you would make the right choice. Come over here, and I will fly you out to see Paku face to face.

quotes.text: Promises, promises!
quotes.transcript: Promises, promises!

quotes.text: Do not worry. Your wing friend will be fine. I have a plan.

quotes.text: I serve Paku, one of the oldest of the Loa.

quotes.text: May Pakul spy your enemies before they spy you.
quotes.transcript: May Pakul spy your enemies before they spy you.

quotes.text: Choose your lower wisely.

quotes.transcript: Greetings, Bakura Eye!

quotes.text: Now if I could just get my wife to give me this much attention.

quotes.text: Oh, perfect! That really hit the spot!

quotes.text: Lottie, what took you so long?
quotes.transcript: Lottie, what took you so long?

quotes.text: The lower favor you. That is a good thing. Just do not let it go to your head.

quotes.text: That should teach those who pray on villagers from the shadows. Well done.

quotes.text: The great Pakhu has decided that Jiharak has outgrown her time with us. Gather your forces and slay this creature!
quotes.transcript: The great Pakhu has decided that Jiharak has outgrown her time with us. Gather your forces and slay this creature!

quotes.text: Well done! Her passing will allow future generations to thrive.

quotes.transcript: we will lead the way. Trust in each other and the rest will come. Now, to the skies!

quotes.text: Ah, I see now. Perhaps he is not meant to soar in the clouds. But with you at his side, it will still be a good life.
quotes.transcript: Ah, I see now. Perhaps he is not meant to soar in the clouds. But with you at his side, it will still be a good life.

quotes.text: They say Rastakhan has no power here. Show them the error of their ways. Drive their heresy from Tal Ghorub.
quotes.transcript: They say Rastakhan has no power here. Show them the error of their ways. Drive their heresy from Tal Ghorub.

quotes.text: Please inform the happy couple, I will be down shortly.
quotes.transcript: Please inform the happy couple, I will be down shortly.

quotes.text: Please forgive my tardiness.
quotes.transcript: Please forgive my tardiness.

quotes.text: Alexander, have you prepared the... Wait, what was that?
quotes.transcript: Alexander, have you prepared the... Wait, what was that?

quotes.text: I don't believe I left them with Lucy's letters, but I suppose it's prudent to be sure.
quotes.transcript: I don't believe I left them with Lucy's letters, but I suppose it's prudent to be sure.

quotes.text: Friends, family and honored guests, we gather on this fine autumn day to celebrate the joining of Lucille and Alexander.
quotes.transcript: Friends, family and honored guests, we gather on this fine autumn day to celebrate the joining of Lucille and Alexander.

quotes.text: as the Lord Governing Drosvar, and as Lucille's proud father. It is my honor to wed these two in the presence of the land, the sky, and the sea.
quotes.transcript: as the Lord Governing Drosvar, and as Lucille's proud father. It is my honor to wed these two in the presence of the land, the sky, and the sea.

quotes.text: Lucy is merely following her heart, Meredith. Just as I did when I wed you.
quotes.transcript: Lucy is merely following her heart, Meredith. Just as I did when I wed you.

quotes.text: For I am thankful for your help, I must ask that you not rummage through my daughter's undergarments.
quotes.transcript: For I am thankful for your help, I must ask that you not rummage through my daughter's undergarments.

quotes.text: Oh, you found it! Thank the tides.
quotes.transcript: Oh, you found it! Thank the tides.

quotes.text: Oh, and do convey my apologies for the delay.
quotes.transcript: Oh, and do convey my apologies for the delay.

quotes.text: She will be down shortly. She asked that I begin in her stead.
quotes.transcript: She will be down shortly. She asked that I begin in her stead.

quotes.text: An ambush! Lucy, get behind me! Guards, two arms!
quotes.transcript: An ambush! Lucy, get behind me! Guards, two arms!

quotes.text: Oh look, husband. Your supper has arrived.
quotes.transcript: Oh look, Hasbond! Your supper has arrived!

quotes.text: Husband, please attend to our guests.
quotes.transcript: Hasbond, please attend to our guests.

quotes.text: No! You won't take him from me!
quotes.transcript: No! You won't take him from me!

quotes.text: Our bond can never be broken!
quotes.transcript: Our bond can never be broken!

quotes.text: I will never let him go!
quotes.transcript: I will never let him go!

quotes.text: We will never be parted...
quotes.transcript: We will never be parted!

quotes.text: Idiot! There can be no witnesses!
quotes.transcript: Idiot! There can be no witnesses!

quotes.text: Welcome home, daughter! I see you brought guests!
quotes.transcript: Welcome home, daughter! I see you brought guests!

quotes.text: I'm telling you Arthur, you should not allow this! Our daughter marrying a common merchant!
quotes.transcript: I'm telling you Arthur, you should not allow this! Our daughter marrying a common merchant!

quotes.text: I can tell by your dull expressions, that in your corner of the world, the concept of a home not made of DUNN is likely new and exciting.
quotes.transcript: I can tell by your dull expressions, that in your corner of the world, the concept of a home not made of DUNN is likely new and exciting.

quotes.text: Come Arthur!
quotes.transcript: Come Arthur!

quotes.text: Serves them right for opposing our love!
quotes.transcript: Serves them right for opposing our love!

quotes.text: We are looking for a book. Don't you think we would have already checked the bookcase?
quotes.transcript: We are looking for a book. Don't you think we would have already checked the bookcase?

quotes.text: Are you trying to waste our time?
quotes.transcript: Are you trying to waste our time?

quotes.text: Here is your money, outlaw. Take it before anyone sees you.
quotes.transcript: Here is your money, outlaw. Take it before anyone sees you.

quotes.text: You had better!
quotes.transcript: You had better!

quotes.text: Ladies, ensure all visitors are made comfortable.
quotes.transcript: Ladies, ensure all visitors are made comfortable.

quotes.text: Why, Marshal, that's no way to talk to a lady! I should teach you some manners!
quotes.transcript: Why, Marshal, that's no way to talk to a lady! I should teach you some manners!

quotes.text: Her heart isn't doing our house any favours.
quotes.transcript: Her heart isn't doing our house any favours.

quotes.text: Why would my husband put his notebook in Lucille's pack? Are you daft?
quotes.transcript: Why would my husband put his notebook in Lucille's pack? Are you daft?

quotes.text: Where you come from? Is it considered polite to murder your hostess's servants?
quotes.transcript: Where you come from? Is it considered polite to murder your hostess's servants?

quotes.text: Un-second thought, don't answer that.
quotes.transcript: Un-second thought, don't answer that.

quotes.text: Continue to meddle in my affairs and your deaths will be long and abhorrent.
quotes.transcript: Continue to meddle in my affairs and your deaths will be long and abhorrent.

quotes.text: You have overstayed your welcome. Very well. Now you shall never leave these grounds!
quotes.transcript: You have overstayed your welcome. Very well. Now you shall never leave these grounds!

quotes.text: Such insolence! Wait until your father hears of this! In the meantime, I leave you in the care of my servants!
quotes.transcript: Such insolence! Wait until your father hears of this! In the meantime, I leave you in the care of my servants!

quotes.text: It appears we have uninvited guests. No matter. I'm certain we can accommodate them.
quotes.transcript: It appears we have uninvited guests. No matter. I'm certain we can accommodate them.

quotes.text: Oh dear, it seems you have slaughtered my entire household!
quotes.transcript: Oh dear, it seems you have slaughtered my entire household!

quotes.text: The carnage is dripping through the floorboards!
quotes.transcript: The carnage is dripping through the floorboards!

quotes.text: Why not join me in the basement and marvel at death's beauty?
quotes.transcript: Why not join me in the basement and marvel at death's beauty?

quotes.text: That's far enough.
quotes.transcript: That's far enough.

quotes.text: I'm so glad you could join us, my dear. Your father has missed you so.
quotes.transcript: I'm so glad you could join us, my dear. Your father has missed you so.

quotes.text: Be appreciative girl, not only is your father alive and well, but he will soon be lord of all Kulteras. Come join us, child.
quotes.transcript: Be appreciative girl, not only is your father alive and well, but he will soon be lord of all Kulteras. Come join us, child.

quotes.text: Now, Marshal, be a deer and bring Lucille to my quarters, after you dispose of these pests.
quotes.transcript: Now, Marshal, be a deer and bring Lucille to my quarters, after you dispose of these pests.

quotes.text: Simply inferior!
quotes.transcript: Simply inferior!

quotes.text: Good riddance!
quotes.transcript: Good riddance!

quotes.transcript: OOOOO benim

quotes.text: Be a dear husband and tidy up this mess.
quotes.transcript: Be a dear husband and tidy up this mess.

quotes.text: You will be consumed!
